zh.Chipping Warden, Northamptonshire, Engla: 英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾其皮三 瓦登
英國諾薩普頓史爾其皮三 瓦登
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Foliot於1168年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾其皮三 瓦登時，她的父親Richard Foliot13歲，母親Anabilis de Hastings12歲。她於1198年與Wischard Ledet在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾其皮三 瓦登結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1222年在她的家鄉享年54歲。

zh-hans.Chipping Warden, Northamptonshire, Engla: 英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾其皮三 瓦登
英国諾薩普頓史爾其皮三 瓦登
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Foliot于1168年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾其皮三 瓦登时，她的父亲Richard Foliot13岁，母亲Anabilis de Hastings12岁。她于1198年与Wischard Ledet在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾其皮三 瓦登结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1222年在她的家乡享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: Foliot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian (Lombardy): variant of   Foglio  . This surname is very rare in Italy.

variants.name: Foglio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carmine, Dino, Flavio, Julieta, Sal, Salvatore.
Italian: probably from the Latin personal name Folius (which is embodied in the common placename Fogliano).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Foliot was born in 1168, in Chipping Warden, Northamptonshire, England, her father, Richard Foliot, was 13 and her mother, Anabilis de Hastings, was 12. She married Wischard Ledet in 1198, in Chipping Warden, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1222, in her hometown, at the age of 54.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Foliotが1168年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアチップイング ワーデンで生まれた時，父Richard Foliotは13歳，母Anabilis de Hastingsは12歳であった。1198年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアチップイング ワーデンでWischard Ledetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1222年に故郷で54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Foliot(이)가 1168년 영국 노르섬프토실르 치핀그 워든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Foliot(은)는 13세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anabilis de Hastings(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 1198년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 치핀그 워든에서 Wischard Ledet(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1222년 그녀의 고향에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Wischard Ledet в 1198 г. в местности чиппинг варден, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1222 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 54 лет.
